title: RBI holds rates and warns food inflation can delay household relief
description: India's central bank kept rates unchanged as food prices remained sticky, signaling that loan EMIs may not ease soon.
content: The RBI said inflation must be watched closely before policy can become easier for borrowers.

title: Oil jumps after Red Sea attacks force tankers to reroute
description: Fresh disruption in the Red Sea raised concerns that shipping and insurance costs will lift fuel-linked inflation.
content: Traders watched crude and freight markets after tankers avoided a major shipping corridor.

title: China export rebound strains supply chains for electronics makers
description: A rebound in Chinese exports increased demand for freight capacity and key components used by manufacturers.
content: Electronics and EV supply chains are watching component inventories and port congestion.

title: US Treasury yields rise as Fed says inflation progress is not enough
description: Higher yields signaled that investors expect borrowing costs to stay elevated for longer.
content: Federal Reserve officials said they need more confidence before cutting interest rates.

title: Indian government weighs fuel tax relief before summer travel season
description: Policy makers are discussing relief as higher fuel prices pressure commuters and logistics firms.
content: The debate could affect household transport bills and government revenue.
